text:
ID CHAR 36
PATIENT_DOB Patient's Date of Birth DATE 8
PATIENT_SEX1 Patient's Sex CHAR 1
PATIENT_RACE Patient's Race CHAR 6
PATIENT_ETHNICITY Patient's Ethnicity CHAR 6
IS_MEDICARE_PARTB Identify if the Patient is Enrolled in Medicare Part B CHAR 1
CREATE_DATE Date the Record was Created DATE 8
LAST_MODIFIED_DATE Date the Patient Record was Modified DATE 8
1In 2025, this field was renamed to sex to comply with Executive Order 14168.
